creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
XL Bailey’s Salted Caramel Tiramisu has finally landed in London! 🍰 This Italian dessert at @tarantella_chiswick  is one of my favourite spots for pure indulgence. Layers of Bailey’s-soaked fingers, creamy mascarpone, rich caramel sauce, and caramelised nuts—this isn’t just tiramisu, it’s tiramisu taken to the next level.

Available until the end of February—pre-book in advance! Perfect to share with 6+ friends. If you love desserts in London and salted caramel treats, this is a must-try. 😍

#LondonDesserts #TiramisuLondon #SaltedCaramelTiramisu #ItalianDessertLondon #FoodieLondon DessertLovers SweetTooth
